title: Casey's General Stores shares trade lower on 2Q revenue miss
text: Casey's General Stores Inc (NASDAQ:CASY) shares traded lower after the convenience store chain reported mixed fiscal second quarter results.  The company, whose portfolio also includes grocery items, posted a 16% year-over-year increase in diluted earnings per share to $4.24 from $3.67, topping estimates of $3.65.

title: Casey's Announces Second Quarter Results
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's General Stores, Inc. ("Casey's" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: CASY) one of the leading convenience store chains in the United States, today announced financial results for the three and six months ended October 31, 2023. Second Quarter Key Highlights Diluted EPS of $4.24, up 16% from the same period a year ago. Net income was $159 million, up 15%, and EBITDA1 was $306 million, up 13%, from the same period a year ago.
